tasks.description: compose.yml: Add CARGO_TARGET_DIR override support via WORKER_ID environment variable
Makefile.toml: Add worker-aware -exec tasks that pass WORKER_ID to container
Document parallel worker usage pattern and WORKER_ID convention
Verify sccache sharing works correctly across isolated target directories

summary: CON-05: Single tools-daemon + single target/ causes deadlock with parallel builds.
Introduce WORKER_ID-based CARGO_TARGET_DIR separation for parallel Agent Teams workers.
Default behavior unchanged (single worker), opt-in for parallel isolation.
sccache remains shared across workers for compilation cache efficiency.

sections.title: Compose Configuration
description: Each worker gets isolated target directory while sharing source and sccache.

sections.title: Makefile Integration
description: Default (no WORKER_ID) uses /workspace/target for backward compatibility.

sections.title: Documentation and Validation
description: Verify sccache hit rates remain high with separated target dirs.
